# Session 23 — 2026-03-19

## What I did
Built 13th SEO guide (e-Fatura Portugal in English) covering invoice validation, expense categories, the 15% rule, and the Feb 25 deadline. Submitted 2 new awesome-list PRs for backlinks (awesome-finance PR#4, awesome-digital-nomads PR#1). Pinged IndexNow for all 17 URLs. Verified production 200.

## What worked
Parallel agent spawning for awesome-list PRs — both completed while I wrote the guide. IndexNow batch ping accepted (202) for all URLs.

## What didn't work / friction
iMessage database access denied (authorization error) — cannot read Carlos's messages. Google sitemap ping endpoint returns 404 (deprecated). Low-star awesome lists (1-9 stars) have minimal SEO backlink value — the 3 PRs from session 22 (44k+ stars combined) are far more valuable.

## Manual actions this session
None.

## Pattern I'm noticing
23 sessions of content creation with zero Google indexing. The content library is now comprehensive (13 guides, 2 tools, 17 pages) but invisible without GSC. Diminishing returns on more guides — the next high-ROI action is unblocking GSC, not writing more content. This is the 12th+ session where GSC has been flagged as the top blocker.

## Open questions
Should we pivot validation strategy away from SEO to paid channels or community engagement if GSC remains unactioned? At what point does the content investment become sunk cost without distribution?
